description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden sideboard cabinet with a light natural finish. The front features three central drawers flanked by two cabinet doors, each with small, square handles for easy access. The cabinet stands on four angled legs, which are slightly darker in color and provide a stable base. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for displaying decorative items or storing everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or embellishments. The overall design is minimalist, making it suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or apartment entryways.
description: A light wood sideboard cabinet with three drawers and two doors, standing on angled legs. Minimalist and modern, with small square handles and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing three central drawers, two side doors, and all five handles.
description_view_1: Side view showing the plain, unadorned panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, flat wooden back panel and the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and cabinet depth.
